title: AEP Event
description: Agent Evolution Protocol event written to the RIG ledger.

eventId.description: Unique identifier for this event (UUID v4).

eventType.description: The type of AEP lifecycle event.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp at which the event was recorded.

component.description: The EvolvableComponent ladder position targeted by this proposal.

proposalId.description: Identifier linking all events in a single proposal lifecycle.

ledgerRef.description: Reference to the RIG ledger entry that triggered this proposal.

baselineBehaviourScore.description: Aggregate behaviour score of the unmodified system on the replay window.

candidateBehaviourScore.description: Aggregate behaviour score of the proposed change on the same replay window.

harmful.description: True when the simulation detected an outcome classified as harmful. Triggers BLOCKED.

blockReason.description: Human-readable reason for a BLOCKED outcome. Present only on aep.simulation.blocked.

ladderViolation.description: Present when the proposal was rejected at ladder validation before simulation.

requiredRejections.description: Components at lower ladder positions that must be simulated and rejected first.
